blocks.text:
ทำไม neonatologist ต้องเข้าใจ Lung Development อย่างลึก?
Lung development คือ foundation ของทุกอย่างที่ทำใน NICU respiratory care. สิ่งสำคัญ: (1) Preterm birth interrupts alveolarization → BPD = alveolar simplification; เข้าใจกลไกนี้ = เข้าใจว่าทำไม BPD ถึง heterogenous; (2) Surfactant system maturation เริ่ม saccular stage (24–36 wk) — RDS คือผลของ surfactant deficiency; (3) Fetal lung fluid clearance ผ่าน ENaC — failure = TTN; (4) Alveolarization postnatal ยาวถึง early adulthood — ดังนั้น lung injuries ใน NICU ส่งผลตลอดชีวิต; (5) CDH = pulmonary hypoplasia จาก disrupted branching morphogenesis; (6) lung surface area ใน adult = 50–100 m² — ต้องสร้างทีละขั้นตอนตาม developmental program.
เป้าหมายการเรียนรู้วันนี้
อธิบาย 5 stages ของ lung development พร้อม timing (weeks of gestation) และ key events ของแต่ละ stage
อธิบาย branching morphogenesis: transcription factors (Nkx2.1/TTF-1, FOXA2, Sox17) และ signaling pathways
อธิบาย alveolarization: secondary septation, myofibroblasts, elastin, pores of Kohn
รู้ surfactant system: Type II AEC, surfactant proteins (SP-A/B/C/D), PC synthesis, corticosteroid induction
อธิบาย fetal lung fluid: composition, production (Cl⁻ secretion), clearance (ENaC/Na⁺ absorption)
เชื่อม CDH กับ pulmonary hypoplasia และ branching morphogenesis disruption
อธิบาย implications ของ preterm birth ต่อ lung development: BPD, surfactant deficiency, new vs old BPD
รู้ role ของ glucocorticoids ใน lung maturation และ antenatal steroid rationale (Liggins & Howie 1972)
1. 5 Stages of Lung Development
Lung organogenesis เริ่ม embryonic day 25 (4 wk GA) ใน human จาก ventral foregut endoderm → 5 stages จนถึง early adulthood (>8 years).

rows: Lung bud formation from foregut; primary bronchi; 5 lobes
Branching morphogenesis; conducting airways complete to terminal bronchioles; 23 airway subdivisions
Acini form; airway-capillary proximity increases; surfactant synthesis begins; AEC1/AEC2 differentiation
Saccule expansion; surfactant production ↑; ENaC expression ↑; gas exchange possible
RDS if born here; TTN risk
Secondary septation → true alveoli; microvascular maturation; surface area ↑ to 50–100 m²

blocks.text: 1.1 Embryonic Stage — Lung Bud to 5 Lobes
Lung endoderm specification: ventral foregut → Nkx2.1 (TTF-1) = master transcription factor for lung; knockout → no lung formation
Primary branching: L main bronchus, R main bronchus → 5 lobar bronchi (2L, 3R) → segmental bronchi

CDH (Congenital Diaphragmatic Hernia): bowel/viscera herniate into thorax → compress developing lung → pulmonary hypoplasia ipsilateral ± contralateral (mediastinal shift); disrupts branching morphogenesis
1.2 Pseudoglandular Stage — Branching Morphogenesis
Branching morphogenesis: repetitive dichotomous branching → total 23 airway generations; final number established คงที่ใน pseudoglandular stage
Key signals: FGF10 (fibroblast growth factor 10) from mesenchyme + FGFR2 on epithelium → tip bud elongation; BMP4 → stalks; Shh (Sonic hedgehog) → branching inhibition
Lung lobe specification: Tbx4/5 (left-right asymmetry); Sox2 = proximal airway marker; Sox9/Id2 = distal bud/tip cells
Stretch/mechanotransduction: fetal breathing movements (FBM) → mechanical stretch → lung growth; oligohydramnios/bilateral renal agenesis (Potter sequence) → no FBM → pulmonary hypoplasia
1.3 Canalicular Stage — Acinus Formation
Terminal bronchioles → pulmonary acinus: respiratory bronchiole + alveolar ducts + primitive alveoli; acinus = unit of gas exchange
Airway-capillary proximity → enabling gas exchange; threshold of viability ~22–24 wk (canalicular–early saccular) เพราะ airway-vascular interface พอ minimal gas exchange ได้
AEC differentiation: Type I alveolar epithelial cell (AEC1) = flat, gas exchange; Type II (AEC2) = cuboidal, surfactant production + progenitor
Surfactant synthesis begins: phosphatidylcholine (PC) via CDP-choline pathway in AEC2; SP-A/B/C/D synthesis begins
1.4 Saccular Stage — Surfactant Maturation
Saccules expand → thin walls; double capillary network forms adjacent to AEC1 and AEC2
Surfactant production increases markedly 28–35 wk: peak maturational surge ~35–36 wk (glucocorticoid surge)
ENaC (epithelial sodium channel) expression ↑ late 3rd trimester → switch from Cl⁻ secretion to Na⁺ absorption → fetal lung fluid clearance prepares for air breathing
1.5 Alveolar Stage — Secondary Septation
Primary saccules → secondary septa form via myofibroblast-driven elastin deposition → true alveoli
Secondary septation requires: (1) myofibroblasts differentiate (PDGF-A/PDGFR-α signaling); (2) elastin deposition at crest tips; (3) microvascular maturation
Pores of Kohn develop → gaseous continuity between acini; route for alveolar macrophages
BPD hallmark: arrested secondary septation → alveolar simplification (large, simplified alveoli; few secondary septa); worse = fewer gas exchange units long-term

Key Concept: Alveolarization เป็น Postnatal Process
Alveoli form เป็นหลักหลัง birth — จาก ~50 million alveoli at birth → 480 million ใน adult. Alveolarization ดำเนิน ~8 ปี หลังคลอด. ดังนั้น preterm birth + lung injury ใน NICU = interrupt ongoing alveolar program → แม้ BPD mild อาจ impair lung growth ยาวนาน. นี่คือทำไม minimize oxygen toxicity, volutrauma, inflammation = protect future alveoli
2. Surfactant System — จาก Lamellar Body สู่ Alveolus
2.1 Surfactant Composition
Phospholipids ~80%: DPPC (dipalmitoylphosphatidylcholine) = primary surface tension-reducing component; ~45% of surfactant weight
Surfactant proteins: SP-A, SP-B, SP-C, SP-D

rows: Host defense; tubular myelin formation; regulate surfactant secretion
Host defense; opsonization; lung inflammation regulation

blocks.text: 2.2 Surfactant Synthesis, Secretion, Recycling
AEC2 synthesizes surfactant → stores in lamellar bodies (LB) → secretes via exocytosis → tubular myelin (large aggregate) → surface film → lipid monolayer at air-liquid interface
Recycling: ~90% surfactant reuptaken by AEC2 → reutilized; only ~10% catabolized by alveolar macrophages
Glucocorticoids: ↑ AEC2 differentiation, ↑ SP-A/B/C/D expression, ↑ PC synthesis; this is mechanism of antenatal betamethasone (Liggins & Howie 1972) → ลด RDS, ลด IVH, ลด mortality
Physical factors → ↑ surfactant secretion: stretch (tidal breathing), β-adrenergic agonists (terbutaline), purinergic signaling; ↓ by: hyperoxia (O2 toxicity → oxidize surfactant)
3. Fetal Lung Fluid — Production และ Clearance
3.1 Composition และ Production
Fetal lung fluid (FLF): high Cl⁻ (157 mEq/L), low protein (0.03 g/dL), low pH (6.27) vs plasma (Cl⁻ 107, pH 7.34) — actively secreted, not transudate
Mechanism of production: active Cl⁻ secretion via CFTR → electrochemical gradient → Na⁺ + H₂O follows → lung fills with ~30 mL/kg at term
FLF essential for lung growth: provides distending pressure for airway branching; oligohydramnios/tracheal ligation → loss FLF pressure → pulmonary hypoplasia/hyperplasia
3.2 Fetal Lung Fluid Clearance — ENaC

ENaC (Epithelial Sodium Channel) — การเปลี่ยนจาก Cl⁻ Secretion เป็น Na⁺ Absorption
Late 3rd trimester: ↑ ENaC α/β/γ subunit expression on AEC2 → Na⁺ absorption → water follows → FLF reabsorbed. Triggers: glucocorticoids, aldosterone, thyroid hormone, ↑ O2 at birth, β-adrenergic surge. Transgenic mice lacking ENaC α → die quickly after birth from FLF retention. TTN (Transient Tachypnea of Newborn) = incomplete FLF clearance at birth (delayed ENaC activation); term C-section: no labor → no β-adrenergic surge → TTN risk. แก้: time, O2 support; resolves 24–72 hr.
Bulk removal: labor contractions → thoracic compression → expel FLF via mouth; vaginal delivery > cesarean in FLF clearance
FLF enhancers: prolactin, keratinocyte growth factor, PGE2, PGF2; inhibitors: β-adrenergic agonists, vasopressin, serotonin, glucagon (หลัง birth)
4. Congenital Lung Malformations — เชื่อมกับ Development

rows: Visceral herniation → compressed lung; disrupts branching
Pulmonary hypoplasia bilateral; PPHN; BAD prognosis if LHR < 1
Accessory bud with systemic arterial supply; no connection to tracheobronchial tree
Focal cystic malformation; variable types; usually communicates with airway
Often detected antenatal US; can regress; surgical if large
↓ FLF (oligohydramnios), ↓ FBM (phrenic nerve dysfunction, diaphragmatic hernia), ↑ thoracic compression

blocks.text: 5. BPD — Arrested Alveolarization
5.1 Old BPD vs New BPD

rows: ELBW/VLBW, mild RDS or no RDS initially
Alveolar simplification, minimal fibrosis, dysmorphic vasculature
Disrupted developmental program: ↓ VEGF, ↓ alveolarization, inflammation

blocks.text: VEGF (Vascular Endothelial Growth Factor): critical for alveolar-vascular coupling; VEGF inhibition (hyperoxia, inflammation) → ลด microvascular density → ลด alveolarization (Jobe & Bancalari AJRCCM 2001)
Alveolar simplification in BPD: ลด septae count, ↑ mean linear intercept (MLI), ลด surface area → progressive respiratory insufficiency
5.2 Corticosteroids และ Lung Maturation

Antenatal betamethasone (2 doses, 24–34 wk GA): ลด RDS (OR 0.6), ลด IVH (OR 0.55), ลด NEC (OR 0.5), ลด neonatal mortality — Liggins & Howie NZ 1972 (landmark RCT); NIH Consensus 1994 → routine; Crowley Cochrane confirmed
Mechanism: glucocorticoid → GR (glucocorticoid receptor) → ↑ SP-A/B/C/D transcription, ↑ ENaC, ↑ AEC2 differentiation, ↑ lamellar body secretion, ↑ phospholipid synthesis, ↑ antioxidant enzymes
Rescue course: single repeat course OK if ≥ 7 days since first course + still < 34 wk + high risk delivery — ไม่แนะนำ multiple courses (brain & adrenal suppression risk)
6. NICU Practical — Lung Development ที่เกี่ยวข้องกับ Clinical
TTN vs RDS ใน near-term: TTN = delayed FLF clearance → tachypnea onset < 2 hr, resolve 24–72 hr, CXR: wet lung/streaky; RDS = surfactant deficiency → worsening respiratory failure, CXR: ground glass
Antenatal steroid delivery: target 24–33+6 wk (ACOG PB 2017); benefit even < 24 wk (periviable) — document timing relative to delivery for NICU team

CDH management: expect bilateral pulmonary hypoplasia + severe PPHN; delay repair until hemodynamically stable; lung-protective vent strategy (avoid barotrauma); ECMO for refractory PPHN; surfactant benefit unclear (lung not RDS-type)

BPD prevention: CPAP-first strategy (COIN, SUPPORT trials) → ลด BPD; vitamin A 5000 IU/day IM × 12 wk → ลด BPD (Tyson NICHD); caffeine citrate (CAP trial) → ลด BPD; minimize O2 (SpO2 91–95%); avoid prolonged mechanical ventilation
Pulmonary sequestration: systemic arterial supply from aorta → risk hemoptysis/hemothorax; diagnose with color Doppler US or CT angio; elective surgical resection recommended
7. 5 Bedside Pearls

PEARL 1 — SP-B Deficiency = Fatal RDS ใน Term Infant ที่ไม่ตอบสนอง Surfactant
Congenital SP-B deficiency (autosomal recessive) → fatal respiratory failure ใน term newborn; ไม่ตอบสนอง exogenous surfactant (เพราะ lack SP-B for tubular myelin formation + monolayer stability). สงสัยเมื่อ: term infant + severe RDS-like + ไม่ดีขึ้นหลัง surfactant → genetic testing + lung biopsy; only cure = lung transplant

PEARL 2 — ENaC คือ Mechanism ของ Antenatal Steroid สำหรับ TTN
C-section โดยไม่มี labor → ไม่มี β-adrenergic surge → ENaC ไม่ activate → FLF ไม่ clear → TTN. Antenatal betamethasone ↑ ENaC expression (Liggins effect) + ↑ SP-B/C → ลดทั้ง RDS และ TTN. จำ: glucocorticoid ออกฤทธิ์ทั้ง 2 ทาง: surfactant production + FLF clearance

PEARL 3 — Alveolarization ยังไม่เสร็จเมื่อออกจาก NICU
ทารกคลอดก่อนกำหนดออก NICU ที่ ~40 wk CA → alveolarization ยังดำเนินต่ออีก 8+ ปี. ทุก insult ระหว่าง neonatal period (O2 toxicity, infection, volutrauma) = disrupt ongoing alveolar program. ดังนั้น BPD ใน NICU ≠ จบที่ discharge — เป็น long-term respiratory disease; ควรส่ง follow-up pulmonology.

PEARL 4 — VEGF ขาด = No Alveolar-Vascular Coupling = New BPD
Hyperoxia + inflammation → ↓ VEGF → ลด pulmonary capillary growth → ลด alveolarization (cross-talk กัน). New BPD = vascular disease ด้วย ไม่ใช่แค่ airway/parenchyma. PPHN in BPD เกิดจาก pulmonary vascular remodeling. Sildenafil + pulmonary vasodilators เป็น part ของ treatment ใน BPD-PH.

PEARL 5 — FBM (Fetal Breathing Movements) สำคัญกว่าที่คิด
FBM ไม่ได้แค่ 'การซ้อมหายใจ' — FBM → mechanical stretch → mechanotransduction → ↑ branching morphogenesis + alveolarization. Oligohydramnios (renal agenesis, prolonged rupture) → ↓ FBM → pulmonary hypoplasia. Potter sequence = bilateral renal agenesis + oligohydramnios + pulmonary hypoplasia + limb deformities — not a separate disease, เป็น developmental cascade.
8. Evidence Update — Landmark Studies
Liggins GC, Howie RN. Pediatrics 1972;50:515: First RCT antenatal betamethasone — RDS ↓ from 26% to 9%; landmark that changed neonatal care worldwide.
NIH Consensus Conference. JAMA 1994;273:413: Antenatal corticosteroids recommended for all at risk of preterm delivery 24–34 wk; repeat courses controversial.
Crowley PA. Cochrane 1995;CD000065: Meta-analysis antenatal corticosteroids — RDS RR 0.63; IVH RR 0.54; NEC RR 0.46; death RR 0.69.
Jobe AH, Bancalari E. AJRCCM 2001;163:1723: Defined new BPD: O2 need at 28 days + 36 wk; characterized alveolar simplification, VEGF deficiency, vascular involvement.
Herriges M, Morrisey EE. Development 2014;141:502: Comprehensive review lung organogenesis — transcription factor networks, branching morphogenesis, alveolarization; seminal mechanistic reference.
Morrisey EE, Hogan BL. Dev Cell 2010;18:8: Preparing for the first breath — cellular mechanisms of lung development; AEC1/AEC2 differentiation, secondary septation key biology.
Tyson JE et al. NEJM 1999;340:1962 (NICHD Vitamin A trial): Vitamin A 5000 IU IM 3×/week × 4 wk → ↓ BPD (O2 at 36 wk) OR 0.89; NNT ~13 in ELBW.
Schmidt B et al. NEJM 2006;354:2112 (CAP trial): Caffeine citrate in VLBW — ↓ BPD (36%, p<0.001); ↓ time on MV; ↑ survival without NDI; mechanism: ↓ apnea → ↓ vent days → ↓ lung injury.
SUPPORT Study Group. NEJM 2010;362:1970: CPAP vs intubation for RDS — non-inferior; ↓ intubation/surfactant; mild ↑ pneumothorax; established CPAP-first strategy.
Doyle LW et al. Cochrane 2021;CD001145: Postnatal dexamethasone for BPD — ↓ BPD but ↑ CP risk; reserve for severe intractable BPD; low-dose regimens safer.
9. Self-Check Questions พร้อมเฉลย
Q: 5 stages ของ lung development คืออะไร? เมื่อไหร่เริ่ม alveolarization?

ตอบ: Embryonic (4–7 wk) → Pseudoglandular (7–16 wk) → Canalicular (16–24 wk) → Saccular (24–36 wk) → Alveolar (36 wk → 8+ yr postnatal). Alveolarization = secondary septation เริ่ม ~36 wk แต่เป็นหลักหลัง birth จนถึง ~8 ปี. สำคัญ: alveoli ตอน birth ~50 million → adult 480 million. Preterm birth interrupts this postnatal alveolar program.
Q: Surfactant protein B มีบทบาทอย่างไร? ขาด SP-B เกิดอะไรขึ้น?

ตอบ: SP-B: small hydrophobic protein → critical for surfactant adsorption to air-liquid interface, spreading, and monolayer stability. ขาด SP-B (congenital SP-B deficiency) → fatal respiratory failure ใน term newborn; ไม่ตอบสนอง exogenous surfactant replacement (เพราะ exogenous surfactant ต้องการ SP-B สำหรับ tubular myelin formation); autosomal recessive; diagnosis: lung biopsy + genetic testing; only cure = lung transplant.
Q: ENaC คืออะไร? ทำไม C-section ถึงเพิ่ม risk TTN?

ตอบ: ENaC (Epithelial Sodium Channel) บน AEC2 → Na⁺ absorption ← water follows → fetal lung fluid reabsorption. C-section without labor → ไม่มี β-adrenergic surge จาก labor → ENaC ไม่ถูก upregulate → FLF retained → TTN. Antenatal betamethasone ↑ ENaC expression → ลด TTN (and RDS). นอกจากนี้ vaginal delivery → thoracic compression → bulk FLF removal. C-section + ไม่มี labor = double jeopardy สำหรับ FLF clearance.
Q: อธิบาย mechanism ของ antenatal betamethasone ต่อ lung maturation

ตอบ: Betamethasone → glucocorticoid receptor (GR) → (1) ↑ SP-A/B/C/D transcription; (2) ↑ AEC2 differentiation; (3) ↑ PC synthesis (CDP-choline pathway); (4) ↑ ENaC expression → fetal lung fluid clearance; (5) ↑ antioxidant enzymes; (6) ↑ lamellar body secretion. Evidence: Liggins 1972 first RCT; Crowley Cochrane 1995 confirmed ↓ RDS (RR 0.63), ↓ IVH, ↓ NEC, ↓ death.
Q: New BPD ต่างจาก old BPD อย่างไร? role ของ VEGF คืออะไร?

ตอบ: Old BPD: more mature infants, severe RDS, O2 toxicity + barotrauma → fibrosis + emphysema + airway injury. New BPD (post-surfactant): ELBW, alveolar simplification, minimal fibrosis, prominent vascular disease. VEGF role: VEGF couples alveolar-vascular development; hyperoxia/inflammation → ↓ VEGF → ↓ pulmonary capillary growth → ↓ alveolarization (cross-talk disrupted). New BPD = both alveolar AND vascular problem → PPHN common → may need pulmonary vasodilators.
Day 39 Preview

Avery Chapter 39 — Neonatal Pulmonary Physiology
พรุ่งนี้ต่อด้วย Neonatal Pulmonary Physiology — เรามี framework ของ lung structure แล้ว ตอนนี้จะมาดู function: FRC, compliance, resistance, work of breathing, time constants, V/Q matching, gas exchange. ทักษะนี้จะทำให้เข้าใจว่าทำไม FiO2 ≠ แก้ V/Q mismatch, ทำไม BPD มี frequency-dependent compliance, และทำไม time constant สำคัญสำหรับ ventilator setting. เชื่อมกับวันนี้: alveolar structure ที่ damaged ใน BPD → ผลต่อ mechanics วันพรุ่งนี้.
